name: StatTile
description: Broker-status metric tile: small label, big preformatted value with optional unit suffix, optional sparkline, subdued no-data state.

props.name: value
props.description: Preformatted display string (SI abbreviation etc. is done by the caller).

props.name: unit
props.description: Subdued suffix rendered after the value, e.g. '/s'.

props.name: points
props.description: {t, v}[] sparkline samples; omitted or <2 points hides the sparkline.

props.name: noData
props.description: Shows a subdued 'no data yet' placeholder instead of the value.

notes: Figma is not linked yet; stories use local fixtures. Sparkline color is set here via text-primary on the wrapper.
